title: Color Picker Demo

controls.code:
def on_color_change_colorPicker():
    color = colorPicker.get_color()
    lblHex.caption = f'Hex: {color.to_hex()}'
    lblRGB.caption = f'RGB: {color.r}, {color.g}, {color.b}'
    lblTerminal.caption = f'Terminal: {color.to_terminal_color()}'
    update_preview()

def on_color_select_colorPicker():
    color = colorPicker.get_color()
    msgbox(f'Selected: {color.to_hex()}', 'Color')

controls.caption: Apply
Random
controls.code:
def on_click_btnRandom():
    import random
    r = random.randint(0, 255)
    g = random.randint(0, 255)
    b = random.randint(0, 255)
    color = Color(r, g, b)
    colorPicker.set_color(color)

code:
selected_color = Color(128, 128, 128)

def on_load_frmMain():
    update_preview()

def update_preview():
    color = colorPicker.get_color()
    lblPreview.back_color = color.to_hex()
    lblPreview.fore_color = '#FFFFFF' if color.r + color.g + color.b < 384 else '#000000'

def on_menu_mnuCopyHex():
    color = colorPicker.get_color()
    # Copy to clipboard (would use system clipboard in real app)
    msgbox(f'Copied: {color.to_hex()}', 'Copy Hex')

def on_menu_mnuCopyRGB():
    color = colorPicker.get_color()
    rgb = f'{color.r}, {color.g}, {color.b}'
    msgbox(f'Copied: {rgb}', 'Copy RGB')

def on_menu_mnuBasic():
    # Set basic color palette
    basic_colors = [
        '#000000', '#FF0000', '#00FF00', '#0000FF',
        '#FFFF00', '#00FFFF', '#FF00FF', '#FFFFFF',
        '#808080', '#C0C0C0', '#800000', '#808000'
    ]
    colorPicker.set_palette(basic_colors)
    msgbox('Basic palette loaded', 'Palette')

def on_menu_mnuWeb():
    # Set web-safe color palette
    web_colors = [
        '#000000', '#333333', '#666666', '#999999', '#CCCCCC', '#FFFFFF',
        '#FF0000', '#00FF00', '#0000FF', '#FFFF00', '#00FFFF', '#FF00FF',
        '#800000', '#008000', '#000080', '#808000', '#008080', '#800080'
    ]
    colorPicker.set_palette(web_colors)
    msgbox('Web colors palette loaded', 'Palette')
